decisions_log.decision: Use Drizzle ORM patterns (not Prisma) — codebase uses Drizzle with pgTable
decisions_log.reason: Schema is in apps/web/src/db/schema.ts using Drizzle, not Prisma

decisions_log.decision: Skills are lightweight modules plugging into existing traceAgent + Zod infrastructure
decisions_log.reason: Elevay already has mature observability, no need for new framework

decisions_log.decision: 24 skills in queue ordered by effort (Wrapper first) then priority (P0 first)
decisions_log.reason: Quick wins with Wrappers validate infra; P0 covers core GTM flow

decisions_log.decision: tracedGenerateObject uses _trace field, not separate agentId/tenantId params
decisions_log.reason: Read traced-ai.ts source — it destructures { _trace, ...aiParams } from params

decisions_log.decision: Wrappers call real Apollo/scoring/sequence-generator functions directly
decisions_log.reason: Zero abstraction layer needed — existing code is already well-structured

decisions_log.decision: Signal scanner uses diff-based activity comparison (recent vs older half) for engagement spikes
decisions_log.reason: Matches goose-skills pattern of diff-based detection without external APIs

decisions_log.decision: Created unified /api/skills/[slug] route for all skills
decisions_log.reason: Single entry point with dryRun default=true for safety; GET /api/skills/list for discovery

decisions_log.decision: All LLM-using skills fallback from Anthropic to OpenAI if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set
